apply: Students will be able to apply the concept of comparative advantage to explain trade patterns between countries.
Students will be able to use the concept of export-oriented and import-substituting industrialisation to explain the growth of international business.
Students will be able to apply the concept of international business to explain the globalisation of markets and industries.
Students will be able to use the concept of international business to explain the impact of globalisation on the economy of a country.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the impact of international business on the economy of a country.
Students will be able to evaluate the role of international business in the global economy.
Students will be able to compare and contrast the advantages and disadvantages of international business.
Students will be able to evaluate the impact of international business on employment, income and economic growth.
remember: Students will be able to recall the major developments in international business.
Students will be able to list the various forms of international business.
Students will be able to explain the characteristics of export-oriented and import-substituting industrialisation.
Students will be able to describe the role of international business in the global economy.
understand: Students will be able to understand the reasons for international business growth.
Students will be able to comprehend the difference between international business and foreign trade.
Students will be able to explain the concept of comparative advantage and its significance in international business.
Students will be able to describe the importance of international business in a country's economic development.

ncert_objectives: Explain the growth and importance of international business.
Describe the characteristics of export-oriented and import-substituting industrialisation.
Explain the concept of comparative advantage and its significance in international business.
Discuss the role of international business in a country's economic development.
board_exam_objectives: Explain the major developments in international business.
Discuss the forms of international business.
Explain the concept of international business and its importance in the global economy.
Describe the impact of international business on the economy of a country.
